text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence where computers learn to understand visual information from the world. It uses image recognition to identify objects, people, or scenes in photos and videos. Object detection goes further by locating these items within an image. This technology has many practical applications. For example, it is used in smartphones for face recognition, in healthcare for analysing medical scans, and in manufacturing for checking product quality. One of the most important uses is in self-driving cars, which rely on computer vision to detect other vehicles, pedestrians, road signs, and obstacles to navigate safely.
